verdict.answer_first: A: first line gives bottom line, "The fastest path is `docker system prune`"; B starts with a category intro, "commands, from safest to most aggressive."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more clearly: "My recommendation: run `docker system df` first"; B is more of a menu: "from safest to most aggressive."
